name: Grease
description: Slick grease covers the ground in a 10-foot square centered on a point within range and turns it into difficult terrain for the duration. When the grease appears, each creature standing in its area must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or fall prone. A creature that enters the area or ends its turn there must also succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or fall prone.
effect: Creates a 10-ft-square zone of slick grease. On initial cast: Dexterity save or fall prone. Any creature entering or ending its turn in the zone must save or fall prone. The zone is difficult terrain for its duration.
notes: Save applies on cast (for creatures already in zone) and on each entry or end-of-turn
Prone condition: disadvantage on attack rolls; melee attacks against prone target have advantage
Engine gap: persistent terrain zone with per-entry DEX save and prone condition not yet implemented [~]
Modeled by primary DEX save shape; full zone mechanic requires engine support
